spec_natural_language: function __TokenRoles_init MUST revert when called after the contract has already been initialized

violated_invariant.precondition: contract has already been initialized (initialization function was previously called)
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: The function should only execute successfully once during initial deployment; subsequent calls must revert to prevent re-initialization of owner and operator roles

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly identifies that __TokenRoles_init lacks the initializer modifier and can be called multiple times by anyone. The invariant is straightforward: initialization functions in upgradeable contracts must only be callable once. The line reference and function name are explicitly stated.
